reviews.comment:
En la playa son MUY lentos para atender. Pero... El agua para el mate es grátis!!!, los baños están impecables y en el shop, aunque no pueden ofrecer más que un café con medialunas o tostado, atienden muy amablemente.

(Translated by Google)
The service on the beach is VERY slow. But... the hot water for mate is free!!!, the bathrooms are spotless, and in the shop, although they can only offer coffee with croissants or toast, the service is very friendly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/656140726491061597/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNfNVpPTlNREAE

reviews.comment:
Agua gratis para el mate, baños decentes, comida rica y wifi gratis. Ademas muy surtido el negocio. Excelente.

(Translated by Google)
Free water for mate, decent restrooms, delicious food, and free Wi-Fi. Plus, the store has a great selection. Excellent.

reviews.comment:
Una vergüenza viajar tantos km llegar a este lugar y no tener un poco de agua para mojarce la cabeza.lindo lugar empiecen a regarlo para que se ponga verde políticos vagos.

(Translated by Google)
It's a shame to travel so many kilometers to get to this place and not have a little water to wet your head. Nice place, start watering it so it turns green, lazy politicians.

reviews.comment:
Nunca nos sentimos tan maltratados. Nos echaron de  la sombra haciendo 40°C. nos echaron de los surtidores, no nos dejaban pasar para atras tuve que dar la vuelta por la ruta. Es YPF y ACA pero la verdad que recomiendo que vayan a la nueva que esta de la mano de en frente antes. Gente mala leche

(Translated by Google)
We've never felt so mistreated. They kicked us out of the shade in 40°C heat. They kicked us out of the pumps, wouldn't let us back in, and I had to go all the way around. It's a YPF and an ACA, but I really recommend going to the new one across the street. Bad people.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/656140726491061597/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURmaWNlSWRREAE

reviews.comment:
Quiero destacar la buena atención de sus empleados y la gran disposición que tienen tanto ellos como sus dueños

(Translated by Google)
I want to highlight the excellent service from their employees and the great helpfulness of both them and the owners.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/656140726491061597/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQzaG9yY2hnRRAB

reviews.comment:
.. juuuusto entré al baño después de cargar y no había agua ... 40* marcaba la temperatura, imaginen el descontento

(Translated by Google)
I just went into the bathroom after charging and there was no water... the temperature was showing 40°C, imagine my disappointment!

reviewReply.comment: Le pedimos disculpas. Lamentablemente con la gran demanda de agua y las altas temperatura nos vemos obligados a cerrar los baños cuando pasa esto, por un tema de higiene, espero sepa entender.

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/656140726491061597/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURmdnVYamNnEAE

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
